parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.first().json.data || []; const first = items[0] || {}; const confirmRaw = $('Webhook: Confirm').first().json; const body = confirmRaw.body ?? confirmRaw; const taskRows = (body.actionItems || []).map(t => ` ${t.task} ${t.owner} ${t.deadline} ${t.priority} ` ).join(''); const decisionsHtml = (body.decisions || []).map(d => `
  • ${d}
    • ` ).join(''); const html = `

    Meeting Summary

    ${body.summary}

    Decisions

      ${decisionsHtml}

    Action Items

    ${taskRows}
    Task Owner Deadline Priority

    Powered by Recap

    `; const notionUrl = `https://notion.so/${(first.notionDatabaseId || '').replace(/-/g, '')}`; return [{ json: { html, emailList: body.attendeeEmails || [], taskCount: (body.actionItems || []).length, notionUrl } }];
